message:
feat: LISR-5 complete — verification and behavioral proof pipeline

LISR-5.2: Capability monotonicity proof reports (CapabilityDelta,
compute_capability_proof, CapabilityProofReport) — proves repaired
artifacts don't add new capabilities.

LISR-5.3: Hostcall parity and semantic delta proof
(HostcallCategory, SemanticParityReport, compute_semantic_parity)
— proves repairs don't expand hostcall surface or cause semantic drift.

LISR-5.4: Conformance replay and golden checksum evidence
(compute_artifact_checksum, GoldenChecksumManifest,
ConformanceReplayReport, VerificationBundle) — unified
activation gate requiring all proofs to pass.

264 tests passing, zero clippy warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
